DatasetCreate.description:
Schema for creating a Dataset from an upload.

Step 2 of the upload flow: Only upload_id is required.
Dataset name defaults to 'New Dataset' (business rule on domain model).
DatasetCreate.title: DatasetCreate

DatasetUpdate.description: Schema for updating a Dataset's metadata.
DatasetUpdate.title: DatasetUpdate

ReportCreate.description: Schema for creating a new report.
ReportCreate.title: ReportCreate

TransformBatchUpdate.description: Request body for PATCH /datasets/:id/transforms — batch update.
TransformBatchUpdate.title: TransformBatchUpdate

TransformCreate.description:
Schema for creating a Transform.

dataset_id will come from the URL path, not the request body.

Cross-field validation rules by transform_type:
- filter: requires condition_json + condition_sql; rejects expression fields
- clean/alias/map: requires target_column + expression_config; rejects condition fields
TransformCreate.title: TransformCreate

TransformCreateBatch.description: Request body for POST /datasets/:id/transforms — batch create.
TransformCreateBatch.title: TransformCreateBatch

TransformUpdateItem.description: A single item in a batch update.
TransformUpdateItem.title: TransformUpdateItem

ViewCreate.description: Schema for creating a new view.
ViewCreate.title: ViewCreate

get.description: Root endpoint.
Serve the dev-mode JWKS public key set.

post.description: Exchange auth code for user + tokens.

get.description: Get login URL to redirect user to.

post.description:
Revoke the session and return a logout redirect URL.

Accepts the access token via the Authorization header (Bearer <token>).
Session revocation is best-effort -- the response always succeeds so the
frontend can clear local state regardless.

get.description: Get current authenticated user.

post.description: Exchange a refresh token for new access and refresh tokens.

get.description: List all datasets with cursor-based pagination, optionally filtered by project.

post.description: Create a dataset from an upload event with partition configuration.

get.description: Get a single dataset by ID with optional transforms and preview.

patch.description:
Batch-update transforms (including soft-delete via status='deleted').

Honors `Idempotency-Key` (Epic C.3); this is the soft-delete entry point
that stands in for `DELETE /rows/{id}` in the bead's mutation set.

post.description:
Batch-create transforms on a dataset.

Honors the optional `Idempotency-Key` request header (Epic C.3): a retry
with the same key returns the cached response without re-creating the
transforms. Reuse with a mismatched body returns 409.
Preview a cleaning transform without persisting anything.
Create a new organization for the current user.

get.description: Get the current user's organization.
List all projects with cursor-based pagination.

delete.description: Delete a project and all its datasets.

get.description: Get a single project by ID (metadata only).
List sparse datasets for a project with cursor-based pagination.
Search datasets by name within a project.
Export a project as a dbt project zip archive.
Get the memory (Stream channel) for a project.
List all reports for a project.
Get a single report by ID.
List sessions for a project with cursor-based pagination.

post.description: Create a new session (Stream thread) in a project.

delete.description: Disable external SQL access for a project.

get.description: Get SQL access connection details for a project.

post.description: Enable external SQL access for a project.
Regenerate SQL access credentials for a project.
Sync external SQL access views with current dataset state.

get.description: List all views for a project.
Get a single view by ID.
List all query engine nodes for the current user's organization.
Get a query engine node with connection strings and project count.

post.description: Test connectivity to a query engine node.

get.description:
SSE replay endpoint (dc-x3y.3.2 / Epic C).

Returns persisted DomainEvents for the session since `since` (opaque
cursor; omit for "from the beginning"). Response shape per the bead:
    {session_id, events, next_cursor, has_more}

Auth: org-scoped (404 for unknown session OR cross-org access — existence
is not leaked). UI directives are filtered out per ADR-014.

Mint a Stream.io JWT for the authenticated user.

Auth is enforced by AuthMiddleware (Bearer token required).

post.description: Upload a file and create a dataset in one step.

get.description: Return registered file format plugins.

post.description:
Process an upload that is awaiting user input (e.g., sheet selection).

Body: {"choices": {"sheet_name": "Sheet1"}}

get.description: Health check endpoint.
